TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: "ť¶¨ŚÖčÁôĹ" . ( Make-pay ) nu ( inggu a kamu : Macbeth ) u masaapuyuan kalabades niSase-piya iti nugikian, u sakanamuhan nu mimelaway a piigiannu kasacacayan. sanisani sa kaladihingan ku pigiki ilabu malabades aca, u sakatawidan ku nikasaditan i piigikian, lalekalan nina giki a kitidaan sa i Su-kelan, sipakay nu gikiay a nipadadan, miawas tu balucu'ay matatebing atu sakay nu cen-ceay madademec, mitapal tu pilungucan tu sikaidaw nu tatungusan miales tu masametekay kacikiyan sadikuday a sakatademaw. .
S.PHON: "***" . ( mak…ô-paj ) nu ( iŇčgu a kamu : ma ¶b…ôtńß ) u masaapujuan kar~…ĺabad…ôs nisas…ô-pija iti nugikian, u sakanamuńßan nu mim…ôr~…ĺawaj a piigiannu kasa ¶a ¶ajan. sanisani sa kar~…ĺadińßiŇčan ku pigiki ir~…ĺabu mar~…ĺabad…ôs a ¶a, u sakatawidan ku nikasaditan i piigikian, r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan nina giki a kitidaan sa i su-k…ôr~…ĺan, sipakaj nu gikiaj a nipadadan, miawas tu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aj matat…ôbiŇč atu sakaj nu ¶…ôn- ¶…ôaj madad…ôm…ô ¶, mitapar~…ĺ tu pir~…ĺuŇču ¶an tu sikaidaw nu tatuŇčusan miar~…ĺ…ôs tu masam…ôt…ôkaj ka ¶ikijan sadikudaj a sakatad…ômaw. .
S.FORM: "ť¶¨ŚÖčÁôĹ" . ( Make-pay ) nu ( inggu a kamu : Macbeth ) u masaapuyuan kalabades niSase-piya iti nugikian, u sakanamuhan nu mimelaway a piigiannu kasacacayan. sanisani sa kaladihingan ku pigiki ilabu malabades aca, u sakatawidan ku nikasaditan i piigikian, lalekalan nina giki a kitidaan sa i Su-kelan, sipakay nu gikiay a nipadadan, miawas tu balucu'ay matatebing atu sakay nu cen-ceay madademec, mitapal tu pilungucan tu sikaidaw nu tatungusan miales tu masametekay kacikiyan sadikuday a sakatademaw. .
S.PHON: "***" . ( mak…ô-paj ) nu ( iŇčgu a kamu : ma ¶b…ôtńß ) u masaapujuan kar~…ĺabad…ôs nisas…ô-pija iti nugikian, u sakanamuńßan nu mim…ôr~…ĺawaj a piigiannu kasa ¶a ¶ajan. sanisani sa kar~…ĺadińßiŇčan ku pigiki ir~…ĺabu mar~…ĺabad…ôs a ¶a, u sakatawidan ku nikasaditan i piigikian, r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan nina giki a kitidaan sa i su-k…ôr~…ĺan, sipakaj nu gikiaj a nipadadan, miawas tu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aj matat…ôbiŇč atu sakaj nu ¶…ôn- ¶…ôaj madad…ôm…ô ¶, mitapar~…ĺ tu pir~…ĺuŇču ¶an tu sikaidaw nu tatuŇčusan miar~…ĺ…ôs tu masam…ôt…ôkaj ka ¶ikijan sadikudaj a sakatad…ômaw. .
